setup.note: Order and fulfillment were created live in this disposable conformance shop for HAR-232 before this read fixture was captured.

detailRead.query: query FulfillmentTopLevelDetails($orderId: ID!, $fulfillmentId: ID!, $fulfillmentOrderId: ID!, $missingFulfillmentId: ID!, $missingFulfillmentOrderId: ID!) { fulfillment(id: $fulfillmentId) { id status displayStatus createdAt updatedAt trackingInfo { number url company } fulfillmentLineItems(first: 5) { nodes { id quantity lineItem { id title } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } fulfillmentOrder(id: $fulfillmentOrderId) { id status requestStatus assignedLocation { name } lineItems(first: 5) { nodes { id totalQuantity remainingQuantity lineItem { id title } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } missingFulfillment: fulfillment(id: $missingFulfillmentId) { id status } missingFulfillmentOrder: fulfillmentOrder(id: $missingFulfillmentOrderId) { id status } order(id: $orderId) { id fulfillments(first: 5) { id status displayStatus createdAt updatedAt trackingInfo { number url company } fulfillmentLineItems(first: 5) { nodes { id quantity lineItem { id title } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } fulfillmentOrders(first: 5) { nodes { id status requestStatus assignedLocation { name } lineItems(first: 5) { nodes { id totalQuantity remainingQuantity lineItem { id title } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } }

catalogRead.query: query FulfillmentTopLevelCatalog($first: Int!, $after: String, $query: String) { openFulfillmentOrders: fulfillmentOrders(first: $first, sortKey: ID) { nodes { id status requestStatus assignedLocation { name } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } allFulfillmentOrders: fulfillmentOrders(first: $first, after: $after, includeClosed: true, sortKey: ID, reverse: false, query: $query) { nodes { id status requestStatus assignedLocation { name } lineItems(first: 5) { nodes { id totalQuantity remainingQuantity lineItem { id title } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } reversedFulfillmentOrders: fulfillmentOrders(first: $first, includeClosed: true, sortKey: ID, reverse: true) { nodes { id status requestStatus } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } manualHoldsFulfillmentOrders(first: $first) { nodes { id status requestStatus } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } }

assignedFulfillmentOrdersAccess.query: query AssignedFulfillmentOrdersAccess($first: Int!) { assignedFulfillmentOrders(first: $first, assignmentStatus: FULFILLMENT_REQUESTED, sortKey: ID) { nodes { id status requestStatus assignedLocation { name } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } }

errors.message: ["The api_client is not associated with any fulfillment service."]
